entry.title: New: Reso 25-82 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
“CONGRATULATING BLAKE ABERNATHY OF KAMEHAMEHA SCHOOLS MAUI AND TEATA MATAAFA GROVE, PITA TAKAFUA, AND BRYSON ADRIC OF H.P. BALDWIN HIGH SCHOOL FOR WINNING STATE TITLES AT THE 2025 HAWAIʻI HIGH SCHOOL ATHLETIC ASSOCIATION STATE WRESTLING CHAMPIONSHIPS”

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
